title: Executive Order 7738—Amendment of Paragraph 6, Subdivision VII, Schedule A, Civil Service Rules
text:
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by paragraph Eighth, subdivision SECOND, section 2 of the Civil Service Act (22 Stat. 403, 404), it is ordered that paragraph 6, Subdivision VII, Schedule A of the Civil Service Rules be, and it is hereby, amended to read as follows:
"6. Temporary clerks, carriers, and laborers required for part-time or intermittent work in the Postal Service in connection with the holiday or seasonal business from November 15, 1937, to January 15, 1938."
FRANKLIN D. ROOSEVELT
The White House,
November 11, 1937.
